blurb_en:
Uber burned through its entire 2026 AI budget by April, four months after deploying Claude Code and Cursor to 5,000 engineers — and its COO is now publicly questioning whether it was worth it.
• Monthly per-engineer costs ran $500–$2,000.
• By April, 95% of engineers used AI tools monthly and 70% of all committed code came from AI.
• Agentic AI usage jumped from 32% to 84% in two months.
• COO Andrew Macdonald on the link between AI adoption and consumer innovation: "That link is not there yet."
• For Insta360 engineers considering AI tool rollouts: this is the cost curve at full adoption, before the ROI math resolves.
• The company that disrupted per-mile taxi billing just discovered per-token billing.
blurb_zh:
今年四月，优步烧完了2026年全年AI预算——此前四个月内，他们把Claude Code和Cursor铺给了5000名工程师，月均每人花费500到2000美元。
• 四月底：95%的工程师在用AI工具，70%的代码提交来自AI。
• 智能体AI使用率在两个月内从32%跳到84%。
• 首席运营官安德鲁·麦克唐纳坦言，AI使用量与面向用户的创新之间「还没看到关联」。
• 对Insta360工程师的参考：这就是AI工具全量铺开、ROI尚未成立时的账单。
• 颠覆了出租车计价方式的公司，被token计费给颠覆了。
verification_notes: Fortune primary source; confirmed by Yahoo Finance (same article), Cybernews, Briefs.co, Cryptobriefing across 5+ search results with consistent facts: 5,000 engineers, $500-$2,000/month, April budget burn, COO quote

blurb_en:
GitHub switched Copilot to token-based billing on June 1, and developers who opened their bills discovered monthly costs had jumped anywhere from 10 to 50 times.
• One developer projected their company's bill jumping from $29 to $750 a month; another from $50 to $3,000.
• Code completions stay free. Every agentic action — the part most teams now rely on — does not.
• The GitHub community forum logged 904 downvotes against 22 upvotes on the change.
• Developers are migrating to Claude Pro ($20/month flat), DeepSeek V4, and local open-source models.
• For Insta360 development teams using Copilot: the June bill is worth previewing before it arrives.
• Token effort, in every sense.
blurb_zh:
6月1日起，GitHub将Copilot全面切换为按token计费，不少开发者打开账单，发现月费涨了十到五十倍。
• 一名开发者估算：公司账单从每月29美元跳至750美元；另一名从50美元涨到3000美元。
• 代码补全免费，但AI智能体的所有操作——也就是大多数团队最依赖的部分——都要收费。
• GitHub社区讨论帖：904个踩，22个赞，435条评论。
• 开发者已在转向Claude Pro（20美元包月）、DeepSeek V4和本地开源模型。
• 对使用Copilot的Insta360开发团队：六月账单值得提前预估一遍。
• 量力而行，从账单开始。
verification_notes: TechCrunch primary (May 30, 2026). Billing went live June 1. Confirmed by GitHub official blog, Dataconomy, How2Shout, SiliconReport, TechJournal across 6+ sources. Community vote count consistent across sources.

blurb_en:
Microsoft shipped its first complete in-house AI model stack this week — image, reasoning, voice, and transcription — a quiet but pointed challenge to the company it has invested $13.75 billion in.
• MAI-Image-2.5, launched May 26, debuted at No. 3 on the Arena text-to-image leaderboard, behind Midjourney and GPT Image 2.
• MAI-Thinking-1, previewed at Build today, is Microsoft's first reasoning model — reportedly built without model distillation, meaning not derived from any other model's outputs.
• MAI-Voice-2 spans 15 languages with an emotional range including angry, confused, and embarrassed.
• Together the four models cover every category OpenAI currently monetizes.
• MAI-Image-2.5 is available now in Azure AI Foundry — worth evaluating for Insta360 design and product imaging workflows.
• The full stack arrived the day after OpenAI's models went live on AWS, Microsoft's main cloud competitor.
blurb_zh:
微软本周发布了首套完整的自研AI模型体系——涵盖图像生成、推理、语音和转录——对其注资137.5亿美元的合作伙伴OpenAI发出隐晦挑战。
• MAI-Image-2.5于5月26日正式发布，在Arena文生图排行榜以第三名首亮相，仅次于Midjourney和GPT Image 2。
• 今日Build大会亮相的MAI-Thinking-1是微软首个推理模型，据报道未经模型蒸馏——完全从头自研，未借助其他模型输出训练。
• MAI-Voice-2支持15种语言，情绪范围涵盖愤怒、困惑和尴尬。
• 四款模型合计覆盖了OpenAI目前商业化的全部能力领域。
• MAI-Image-2.5已可通过Azure AI Foundry访问，Insta360设计和产品团队可纳入评估范围。
• 这套完整阵容发布，恰在OpenAI模型登陆微软云竞争对手AWS的次日。
verification_notes: Microsoft.ai official page confirms MAI-Image-2.5 launch (May 26) and No. 3 Arena ranking. MAI-Thinking-1 Build preview confirmed by Business Standard, Winbuzzer, Testingcatalog (3+ sources, 'reportedly' on no-distillation claim). MAI-Voice-2 emotional range from Winbuzzer/Testingcatalog. OpenAI on AWS from official AWS blog and openai.com/index/openai-on-aws/.
